rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow customers to select required medicines with a single click.
The system shall require customers to create a login account prior to placing an order.
The system shall enable customers to view the status of medicines.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customer can select required medicines with a single click.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The customer selects the required medicines and orders them with a single click.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customer needs to create a login account before ordering.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Before it, the customer needs to create a login account and fill all the details like name, address, any id no, etc.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Customer can view the status of medicines.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The client can able to view the status of the medicines.
